column1: # RustyNES Game Genie code database — bulk catalog (v2.1.3).
# ~10,800 well-known Game Genie codes across ~520 USA/World NES games, ingested
# from the openly-licensed libretro-database cheat files
# (cht/Nintendo - Nintendo Entertainment System/*(Game Genie).cht) and keyed to
# every known USA/World dump's CRC32 via the No-Intro NES DAT. The codes and
# effect names are factual/functional descriptions (not Nintendo program code),
# and the No-Intro CRC32s are factual dump identifiers — both freely
# redistributable as data. Commercial Nintendo ROMs are NEVER committed.
# **CRC32 here is the FULL-FILE No-Intro key** (CRC32 of the whole .nes file
# INCLUDING the 16-byte iNES header) — computed by `crate::game_db::rom_crc32_full`.
# Multiple CRCs per game cover every dump revision, so any common dump matches.
# This differs from `genie_database.tsv` (the curated starter catalog, keyed by
# the header-EXCLUDED `rom_crc32`); the cheat panel matches a loaded ROM against
# BOTH keys, so both files contribute. Native-only (this file is ~760 KB and is
# excluded from the wasm bundle to keep it under the size budget; the wasm demo
# keeps only the curated starter set). Codes are re-validated at load through
# `GenieCode::new`, so a malformed row is silently dropped.
